Speaker 1: It’s not just that she’s cute, okay. It’s just that... she’s really really cute.
Rossie: It doesn’t matter. You don’t dip your pen in the company ink.
Speaker 3: Ross, your little creature’s got the remote again.
Rossie: Marcel, Marcel, give Rossie the remote. Marcel. Marcel, you give Rossie the remote right now... Marce... you give Rossie the remote...
Speaker 3: Great.
Rossie: Relax, I’ll fix it.
Speaker 4:  Cool... "Urkel" in Spanish is "Urkel."
